name: ScanTech AI Systems Inc.
sic_description: Instruments For Meas & Testing of  Electricity & Elec Signals
summary: PARTI . Overview ScanTech AI Systems Inc. (ScanTech AI) was formed as a corporation under the laws of the State of Delaware on July 20, 2023. On September5, 2023, ScanTech AI entered into a business combination agreement (as amended or supplemented, the Business Combination Agreement) with Mars Acquisition Corp. (Mars), a Cayman Island exempted company, Mars Merger Sub I Corp., a Cayman Islands exempted company and a wholly owned subsidiary of Mars (Purchaser Merger Sub), Mars Merger Sub II LLC,...
